basic_details.job_title: Anna University CRS Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Anna University has officially announced the CRS Project Fellow – Junior I Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official Anna University website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as specified in the official notification and hold a First Class B.E./ B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Robotics and Automation, Automobile, or closely related disciplines, along with an M.E./ M.Tech. in Manufacturing, Mechatronics, Robotics and Automation, Industrial Automation and Robotics, Robotics, Automobile, Automotive, Computer Integrated Manufacturing,

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Production/Robotics and Automation/Automobile or closely relevant, M.E/M.Tech in Manufacturing/Mechatronics/Robotics and Automation/Industrial Automation and Robotics/Robotics/Automobile/Automotive/Computer Integrated Manufacturing/CAD/CAM/Engineering Design/Product Design and Development or closely relevant (not earlier than 3 years) & 1st Class
qualification.details: B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production / Robotics and Automation / Automobile / other Closely Relevant Degree specialization AND M.E / M.Tech in Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Robotics and Automation/Industrial Automation and Robotics / Robotics/ Automobile /Automotive / Computer Integrated Manufacturing / CAD / CAM / Engineering Design/ CAD / Product Design and Development / other Closely Relevant Degree Specialization (not earlier than 3 years) & 1st Class.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Anna University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Anna University CRS Project Fellow Junior I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Anna University CRS Project Fellow – Junior I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Anna University to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University CRS Project Fellow – Junior I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Anna University CRS Project Fellow – Junior I recruitment is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the CRS Project Fellow – Junior I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the CRS Project Fellow – Junior I post at Anna University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a B.E/B.Tech and M.E/M.Tech degree in relevant engineering disciplines with a first-class mark.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CRS Project Fellow – Junior I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18200 Per Month (Rs. 14000 + 30% HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Anna University CRS Project Fellow – Junior I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CRS Project Fellow – Junior I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CRS/2025-26/04/1789.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any restrictions on domicile. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply.
